CandyBurstTitle.SpecialSymbols: Special Symbols: Gummy Rocket, Chocolate Bomb, Mystery Sweet

CandyBurstRules.Rule1: Candy Burst is a 6 by 6 arrangement of symbols video slot featuring special symbols that help in cascading more wins.

Rule2.value: The game is played with 20 base bet (fixed), bet level of 1 to 10 and bet size of %{minChip} to %{maxChip}.
Rule2.comment: Both %{minChip}, %{maxChip} will be replaced by the currency symbol, do not translate. Both %{minChip} and %{maxChip} will be replaced by multiplier, do not translate.
Rule2.example: The game is played with 20 base bet (fixed), bet level of 1 to 10 and bet size of 0.1 to 8.

CandyBurstRules.Rule3: After the payout of every round is made, all winning symbols will explode allowing the symbols above them to cascade down for a new round.
CandyBurstRules.Rule4: Additional winning combination will be tallied in every round until no more winning combination can be tallied.
CandyBurstRules.Rule5: Free Spins Feature is played at the same bet size and bet level as the spin that triggered the Free Spins Feature.

CandyBurstFeatures.SpecialSymbolExplain1: If there is a combination of 5 symbols touching horizontally or vertically, a Gummy Rocket is awarded at a random position after wins are paid.
CandyBurstFeatures.SpecialSymbolExplain2: If there is a combination of 6 symbols touching horizontally or vertically, a Chocolate Bomb is awarded at a random position after wins are paid.
CandyBurstFeatures.SpecialSymbolExplain3: If there is a combination of 7 or more symbols touching horizontally or vertically, a Mystery Sweet is awarded at a random position after wins are paid.
CandyBurstFeatures.SpecialSymbolExplain4: All special symbols will stay in their position until it is activated.
CandyBurstFeatures.SpecialSymbolExplain5: During the round with no winning combination, only one special symbol (leftmost, highest row) will be activated.
CandyBurstFeatures.SpecialSymbolExplain6: When a Gummy Rocket is activated, all symbols on either the row or the column where the Gummy Rocket is positioned will explode and pay out.
CandyBurstFeatures.SpecialSymbolExplain7: When a Chocolate Bomb is activated, all symbols surrounding the Chocolate Bomb will explode and pay out.
CandyBurstFeatures.SpecialSymbolExplain8: When a Mystery Sweet is activated, a symbol will be randomly chosen and all of the chosen symbol on the reels will explode and pay out.
CandyBurstFeatures.SpecialSymbolExplain9: If there are 2 or more special symbols touching horizontally or vertically, those special symbols will be activated together and a feature is triggered according to the combination of the special symbols.
CandyBurstFeatures.SpecialSymbolExplain10: Scatter symbol and unactivated special symbol on the reels cannot be exploded by any special symbol.
CandyBurstFeatures.FreeSpinExplain1: 3 Scatter symbols appearing anywhere will trigger the Free Spins Feature with 10 free spins. Each additional Scatter symbol will trigger 2 more free spins.
CandyBurstFeatures.FreeSpinExplain2: All wins are multiplied by x2 during the Free Spins Feature. Candy Burst Feature wins are multiplied by x10.

CandyBurstSpecialCombine.Rocket: When there are 2 Gummy Rockets touching horizontally or vertically and are activated together, all symbols on the row, column and diagonal reels where the combination is positioned will explode and pay out.
CandyBurstSpecialCombine.RocketBomb: When there is 1 Gummy Rocket and 1 Chocolate Bomb touching horizontally or vertically and are activated together, all symbols on either the 3 rows or the 3 columns where the combination is positioned will explode and pay out.
CandyBurstSpecialCombine.RocketSweet: When there is 1 Gummy Rocket and 1 Mystery Sweet touching horizontally or vertically and are activated together, a symbol will be randomly chosen and all of the chosen symbol on the reels will explode and pay out. All symbols on the row and column where the combination is positioned will also explode and pay out.
CandyBurstSpecialCombine.Bomb: When there are 2 Chocolate Bombs touching horizontally or vertically and are activated together, all symbols surrounding the combination at the size of 5 x 5 will explode and pay out.
CandyBurstSpecialCombine.BombSweet: When there is 1 Chocolate Bomb and 1 Mystery Sweet touching horizontally or vertically and are activated together, a symbol will be randomly chosen and all of the chosen symbol on the reels will explode and pay out. All symbols surrounding the combination in the shape of a diamond will also explode and pay out.
CandyBurstSpecialCombine.Sweet: When there are 2 Mystery Sweets touching horizontally or vertically and are activated together, 3 symbols will be randomly chosen and all of the chosen symbols on the reels will explode and pay out.
CandyBurstSpecialCombine.CandyBurst1: When there are 3 or more special symbols touching horizontally and/or vertically and are activated together, all symbols (excluding Scatter symbols and the remaining special symbols) will explode and pay out.
CandyBurstSpecialCombine.CandyBurst2: The wins paid are then multiplied by x2.

CandyBurstCommonRule.WinExplain1: At every spin, any combinations of 4 or more symbols touching horizontally or vertically will result in a winning combination.
CandyBurstCommonRule.WinExplain2: For every winning combination, payout is made for each symbol according to the Paytable.
CandyBurstCommonRule.WinExplain3: A combination win in cash is equal to the value shown in the Paytable multiplied by bet size and bet multiplier.
